{"acceptance_criteria":["tests cover stale cache after update","tests cover cache miss path","no unrelated cache API changes","npm test passes","npm run coverage:contract passes"],"prd_markdown":"# PRD: Cache Invalidation Regression Tests

## Goal
Add focused regression tests for cache invalidation behavior without changing the cache production API.

## Scope
Update `test/cache.test.js` to verify that cache reads do not return stale data after an update and that the cache miss path behaves correctly.

## Non-Goals
Do not modify cache API behavior in `src/cache.js` or `src/cache-storage.js` unless tests reveal a real defect. Do not make unrelated changes to coverage contract tooling.

## Validation
Run the existing test suite and the coverage contract check.","risks":["Existing test helpers may need careful setup/teardown to avoid cross-test cache state leakage.","Coverage contract may require the new tests to exercise specific branches rather than only assert high-level behavior."],"status":"PASS","tasks":[{"acceptance_criteria":["Add or update tests in `test/cache.test.js` covering stale cache after update.","Add or update tests in `test/cache.test.js` covering cache miss behavior.","Do not make unrelated changes to cache public API or contract scripts.","`npm test` passes.","`npm run coverage:contract` passes."],"description":"Add focused regression coverage for cache invalidation and miss behavior, preferring test-only changes while leaving existing cache production APIs untouched.","id":"test-cache-invalidation-regression","likely_files":["test/cache.test.js","src/cache.js","src/cache-storage.js","scripts/check-test-coverage-contract.js"],"title":"Add cache invalidation regression tests","validation_commands":["npm test","npm run coverage:contract"]}]}
